question_prompt: Q25: If an internal employee approached you about moving into a role outside their current function, which of the following would most influence your decision to hire them?
panels: Q25: A colleague or manager vouched for their ability
Q25: I would not consider them without prior experience in the role
Q25: The employee expressed their current role wasn’t the right fit
Q25: They completed relevant training or certifications on their own
Q25: They had a clear, well-articulated plan for how they'd get up to speed
Q25: They had already been doing parts of the job informally (e.g., side projects, cross-team work)
Q25: They present a positive attitude and enthusiasm
